title: 4 Pack Glass Qtip Holder Dispenser Glass Apothecary Jars with Lids Cotton Ball Swab Pad Holder Bathroom Essential Canisters Accessories Jars for Bathroom Organization Vanity Organizers
description:
About this item
Glass Q Tip Holder: This qtip holder bathroom set is made of real glass, no plastic or acrylic. Sturdy and a very nice looking, the glass bathroom canisters add a elegant touch to your bathroom decorations and restroom decor.
Easy On/ Off Lid: With bamboo lids (made out of genuine and renewable bamboo), the lids just sit correctly on top of the cotton ball holder, easy to put on and take off one handed.
Right Size: The cotton swab holder measures 3" x 3-5/8" (Diameter x Height), no get in the way or make the counter look cluttered, but hold a decent amount of cotton swabs and balls. A perfect glass bathroom accessories set.
Versatile Bathroom Organizer: This bathroom jars work perfectly for your q-tips, cotton balls pads or rounds, your hair ties, floss picks, toothbrush heads, small jewelry and other small things around your house.
What You Get: 4 pack Glass Qtip Holder Dispenser; our worry-free 24-month warranty, and friendly 24/7 customer service. If you have any questions, we will resolve your issue within 24 hours.
reviews_5s: These look cute in my bathroom, not overly large but for the price they are perfect.These jars are very nice, with plenty of room for cotton balls, Q tips, and Plackers, and you could fit a few other things in them too I suppose. The lids are nice but they don't seal, and the glass is okay but not super thick, but that's fine for my house because I have one teenager here, no small children, so little danger of them being smashed or opened and contents strewn about (although the teenager did his fair share of that when he was small lol). The three in the front bathroom match well with the bamboo plant stand they sit on (bought separately on Amazon) as well as some other bamboo decor in the bathroom, and it all ties together to make a nice spa vibe. The fourth is currently put away as a spare, but I know I'll be able to use it somewhere. Overall a good product worth spending money on.Looks nice. Good quality.This product is perfect in design. I just wanted to etch the glass for personal use and it would not work. I didn’t see where it said this product was made of Pyrex or borosilicate material, so I assumed it would be ok. I was wrong.These were the best for containers in my bathroom.This product looks great and also helps to organize hair accessories for my children. Love the clean look and how the top is easy to open.When son-in-law was working on shower in bathroom, he accidentally knocked off and broke 2 of the 3 glass jars on a wooden tray that my daughter had purchased for, Qtips, cotton balls and floss picks. When I looked on Amazon for a possible replacement, I found these. They are slightly smaller but otherwise fit perfectly. Well worth the price too.These jars now contain cotton pads, and pantyliners. They sit on top of my toilet in a basket. Much nicer than keeping plastic packages around.Easy access and classy glass jars for misc bathroom supplies like q-tips, floss sticks, and cotton pads. Fit perfectly in medicine cabinet.I bought these for my bathroom counter but decided to use them as a cute hair tie and jewelry holder. So I decided to buy another set for the bathroom again to use as q tip holders and I use the other one to hold my retainer. LOVE THEM.
reviews_1s: These type of canisters usually have a Bennie’s seal. The ones I got did not, the lids are too small and fall off.These pieces of garbage don't have a gasket!!!! They went in the trash as soon as I saw them. These pieces of crap aren't worth the time to send back. Way to go Amazon. You're on par with Goodwill.For how expensive these are, the lids should be able to seal. These are not airtight at all. Would give 0 stars if I could.You get what you pay for I guess... but the wooden tops don't stay on. There is nothing to keep them on the container.
